text.title: Agent Reasoning Depth Budget Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Agent Reasoning Depth Budget output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: task_budget_table starts at max budget without eval evidence
thinking traces included verbatim in next-turn context
no plateau measurement before locking budget

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: task_budget_table populated with a typed value
eval_evidence populated with a typed value
under_thinking_flag populated with a typed value
over_thinking_flag populated with a typed value
compression_template populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
